== Notes for [[Item:Q83764|Q83764]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fatima_bint_Al-Walid

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3143F314D1EFBC189822EF79916CB38F
geni:6000000021373271955

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
